name: skill performance report records a no-data marker when a skill has no observations in the window
command: mkdir -p skills .claude-tdd-pro/skills && printf 'flow-guard: {}\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/skills/perf-stats.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/skills/perf.sh" --stats .claude-tdd-pro/skills/perf-stats.yaml --out skills/PERF.md --now 2026-05-13T00:00:00Z 2>err.txt && grep -q 'no_data' skills/PERF.md && echo ok 1>&2
